commit.subject: LU-000 tests: sanity test_69 on arm - 2.5
commit.message:
LU-000 tests: sanity test_69 on arm - 2.5

Test with patchset 20 of https://review.whamcloud.com/36144
and debug traces.
Try with only one read.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly
Test-Parameters: env=ONLY=69 testgroup=review-ldiskfs-arm
Test-Parameters: env=ONLY=69 testgroup=review-ldiskfs clientdistro=el8.1
Signed-off-by: Sebastien Buisson <sbuisson@ddn.com>
Change-Id: I0e8d4db7ab8a77aba0600788cca9403f7c50f1c7
